final:
module simple_des_encryption(  
    input clk,  
    input [7:0] plaintext,  
    input [7:0] key,  
    output reg [7:0] ciphertext  
);  
    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        ciphertext <= plaintext ^ key;  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      ciphertext <= ~plaintext;
    end
  end

endmodule
